instruction: Extract all core computer science concepts from the following lecture JSON. Return only a newline-separated list of unique concepts. Do not explain anything.

text_blocks.text: (Some slides are from Silberschatz, Galvin and Gagne ©2013)

images.ai_description: Optical illusion artwork of a seemingly chaotic black-and-white pattern that resolves into a hidden face when viewed from a distance, exemplifying perception concepts.
Black and white line drawing of a person's profile with exaggerated features, including a prominent nose and layered hairstyle. Suggests classical or historical caricature style.
Silhouette of a man's side profile in high contrast, emphasizing facial features using black and white. Suitable for discussions on visual perception and contrast.
A monochromatic, stylized drawing of an elderly man with a beard and long hair, wearing a hat, set against a black background.
A high-contrast illustration of an alien with elongated neck and distinct facial features, evoking a classic extraterrestrial image popular in science fiction.
Cartoon depiction of a scientist with wild hair and mustache, playfully sticking out tongue. Iconic representation of eccentric genius and creativity.
